name: wos-aide-cli
description: Task-oriented CLI for interacting with Web of Science, extracting WOS IDs and author data, and delivering reusable data packages.

scripts.lint: node --check bin/wos-aide.js && node --check src/wos-aide.js && node --check src/lib/io.js && node --check src/lib/interactive.js && node --check src/lib/terminal.js && node --check src/lib/update.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "console.error('Publishing to the npm Registry is disabled; publish a private GitHub Release instead.'); process.exit(1)"
